prompts.title: Post Performance Analysis
prompts.use_case: Analyze a single social media post's performance
prompts.prompt: Analyze this social media post performance: [POST_CONTENT]. Metrics: [VIEWS/LIKES/COMMENTS/SHARES]. What made it successful or unsuccessful? Provide 3 specific elements that drove engagement and 3 improvements.
prompts.output_format: JSON with success factors and improvement suggestions

prompts.title: Monthly Performance Report
prompts.prompt: Create a monthly performance report from these posts: [DATA]. Calculate: (1) Average engagement rate, (2) Top 3 performing posts and why, (3) Worst performing and lessons, (4) Engagement trends, (5) Audience growth patterns.

prompts.title: Competitor Analysis
prompts.prompt: Analyze competitor's content strategy: [COMPETITOR_POSTS]. What are their top 5 performing post types? How do they engage? What topics dominate? What gaps exist? How can we differentiate?

prompts.title: Audience Sentiment Analysis
prompts.prompt: Analyze audience sentiment from these comments: [COMMENTS]. What are the top 3 sentiments? What questions are people asking? What objections come up? What do they want more of?

prompts.title: Platform Performance Comparison
prompts.use_case: Compare performance across LinkedIn, Twitter, Email
prompts.prompt: Compare identical content across platforms: [LINKEDIN_METRICS], [TWITTER_METRICS], [EMAIL_METRICS]. Which platform works best? Why? How should we optimize for each?

prompts.title: Content ROI Calculator
prompts.use_case: Calculate actual ROI from content to leads/revenue
prompts.prompt: Calculate content ROI: [POSTS_DATA], [LEADS_FROM_POSTS], [REVENUE_FROM_LEADS]. How many views per lead? Cost per lead? Revenue per 1000 views? What content type converts best?
